creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 170832
Patch to the ports tree

The attached patch updates math/cminpack to 1.3.5

Also, I changed the master site to point to github where current development is taking place.

I also added the reference to the LICENSE_FILE but not LICENSE key since it doesn't seem to fit in any of the available categories.

Attached patches for {9.3,10.1,10.3}amd64
